The optimal angle θ_opt that maximizes P_solar is determined by maximizing η_solar(θ) = 0.20 * cos(θ). This requires finding the value of θ that maximizes cos(θ), which occurs at θ = 0°. * * *  
The solar farm's power output P_solar is calculated as 0.20 * cos(0°) * 2000 * 1000 = 400,000 W. * * *  
The maximum power output occurs when θ = 0°, which is the optimal angle for solar panel efficiency. * * *
